jurisdictionFocus: New Orleans area public crime/court documentation
caseFocus.archivePurpose: Preserve an early GitHub-published crime/court tracking artifact and add a current public-source status note.

archiveNote.publicationContext: GitHub was used as one experimental publishing channel. It was not the final live blog system.
archiveNote.preservationIntent: Original tracked files are preserved so the repo remains provenance evidence rather than a rewritten history.

people.name: Terry Christopher Speaks
people.statusSummary: Convicted of second degree murder, obstruction of justice, and conspiracy to obstruct justice; convictions and sentences affirmed by the Louisiana Fifth Circuit Court of Appeal.
people.sentenceSummary: Life imprisonment at hard labor without benefit of parole, probation, or suspension of sentence on the second degree murder count, with additional obstruction-related sentences described in the appellate opinion.

people.name: Margaret A. Sanchez
people.statusSummary: Pleaded guilty in Jaren Lockhart's death and dismemberment according to public reporting.
people.sentenceSummary: WDSU reported that Sanchez was sentenced to 40 years in prison.

limits: This is not an official court record.
Future updates may add official docket records, sentencing minutes, and additional public sources.
